verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your only Son, no sin to hide But You have sent Him from Your side To walk upon this guilty sod And to become the Lamb of God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your gift of love, they crucified They laughed and scorned Him as He died The humble King, they named a fraud And sacrificed the Lamb of God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, Lamb of God, sweet Lamb of God I love the holy Lamb of God Oh, wash me in His precious blood My Jesus Christ, the Lamb of God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I was so lost, I should have died, But You have brought me to Your side To be led by Your staff and rod, And to be called a lamb of God.
